claim: The eta6 support-positive cone now has a Gordan certificate for the oriented support-plane matrix. With rows A_i=[b_f,-n_f], the test vector [1,0,0,0] gives A_i x = b_f > 0 for all 32 face rows and therefore for all 1,740 expanded face/non-face support rows. By Gordan's alternative, no nonzero y >= 0 solves A^T y = 0 for this support-plane matrix. The full exterior affine-circuit Gordan certificate remains a separate next layer.

certifies: a Gordan alternative witness for the oriented support-plane matrix
no nonzero nonnegative dependence annihilates the support-plane matrix
the certificate expands from 32 face rows to all 1,740 support rows by multiplicity
does_not_certify_because_not_required: Gordan infeasibility for the full affine-circuit matrix A_ext

next_highest_yield_item: Enumerate minimal affine circuits from exterior vertex sets and run the same Gordan alternative on that full A_ext matrix.

stage_protocol.closure: apply Gordan alternative to the support-plane matrix
stage_protocol.coherence: evaluate every row on [1,0,0,0] and check strict positivity
stage_protocol.emit: emit dual rows, observables, cert, report, verifier command, and next target
